$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Machine-readable register for CD-1 through CD-5 management directives.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Correction Directive Register v1

directives.name: parameter_collision
directives.requirement: Composer parameters must not reuse occupied P-26 through P-39. Composer begins at P-40.
directives.stop_condition: Any Composer FFET wiring Composer semantics to P-26 through P-39 stops immediately.

directives.name: stale_source_references
directives.requirement: Composer artifacts cite current v5 authorities or explicitly mark historical references.
current_authorities: Blueprint v3.1, or v3.2 after ratification
Business Logic v2, or v2.1 after ratification
directives.stop_condition: Any superseded document cited as authority stops planning or execution.

directives.name: composer_suite_insertion_amendment
directives.requirement: Composer becomes real only through a ratified suite amendment inserting Phase 6.5 before 6D.
directives.stop_condition: Composer implementation FFETs cannot execute before the amendment is ratified and Gate 3 approved.

directives.name: metadata_normalization
directives.requirement: All imported docs use HAUTM, v5.0 suite metadata, required fields, and for_ratification status.
directives.stop_condition: Missing metadata or non-standard status blocks Gate 2.

directives.name: canonical_record_across_six_faces
directives.requirement: Settings page, canvas, wizard, AI diff, import flow, and Super Admin support surface write through one change pipeline.
directives.stop_condition: Any support or UI face that writes configuration outside the universal change pipeline blocks execution.
